name: Bangkok Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix flour and salt; dredge chicken breasts.
2. In a large skillet, brown the chicken in olive oil and remove it.
3. Combine onion, ham, and garlic in the same skillet over low heat until the onion is soft. Do not let the garlic stick to the skillet. Remove the mixture.
4. Drain all but 1 tablespoon of the oil from the skillet. Add the remaining flour left from dredging the chicken and stir vigorously to ensure it is well-blended.
5. Return the ham mixture to the skillet.
6. Clean and devein the shrimp. To the ham, add beer, shrimp, parsley, paprika, and Tabasco; mix well.
7. Add the chicken back in. Cover and simmer for 20 minutes.
8. Serve with rice or garlic bread.
